    svg: `<svg width="820" height="330" viewBox="0 0 820 330" role="img" aria-label="Per-layer KV cache append">
      <defs>
        <marker id="m13a" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="7" markerHeight="7" orient="auto">
          <path d="M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z" fill="#1f6f78"/>
        </marker>
      </defs>
      <style>
        .cell{stroke:#fff;stroke-width:2}
        .box{fill:#fff;stroke:#e3e1da;stroke-width:1.5}
        .hi{fill:#eef6f6;stroke:#1f6f78;stroke-width:1.5}
        .hot{fill:#fdf2e9;stroke:#b8531a;stroke-width:1.5}
        .txt{font-family:sans-serif;font-size:14px;fill:#1a1a1a}
        .sm{font-family:sans-serif;font-size:12px;fill:#555}
        .edge{stroke:#1f6f78;stroke-width:2.2;fill:none;marker-end:url(#m13a)}
      </style>
      <text x="410" y="30" text-anchor="middle" class="txt">每个 decoder layer 都有自己的 K cache 与 V cache</text>
      <g transform="translate(80,70)">
        <text x="0" y="-12" class="txt">Layer ℓ K cache</text>
        <rect x="0" y="0" width="70" height="38" class="cell" fill="#1f6f78"/><text x="35" y="24" text-anchor="middle" class="sm" fill="#fff">k0</text>
        <rect x="72" y="0" width="70" height="38" class="cell" fill="#1f6f78"/><text x="107" y="24" text-anchor="middle" class="sm" fill="#fff">k1</text>
        <rect x="144" y="0" width="70" height="38" class="cell" fill="#1f6f78"/><text x="179" y="24" text-anchor="middle" class="sm" fill="#fff">k2</text>
        <rect x="216" y="0" width="70" height="38" class="cell" fill="#fdf2e9"/><text x="251" y="24" text-anchor="middle" class="sm">new</text>
        <rect x="288" y="0" width="70" height="38" class="cell" fill="#eef6f6"/><text x="323" y="24" text-anchor="middle" class="sm">free</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(80,145)">
        <text x="0" y="-12" class="txt">Layer ℓ V cache</text>
        <rect x="0" y="0" width="70" height="38" class="cell" fill="#6b4fbb"/><text x="35" y="24" text-anchor="middle" class="sm" fill="#fff">v0</text>
        <rect x="72" y="0" width="70" height="38" class="cell" fill="#6b4fbb"/><text x="107" y="24" text-anchor="middle" class="sm" fill="#fff">v1</text>
        <rect x="144" y="0" width="70" height="38" class="cell" fill="#6b4fbb"/><text x="179" y="24" text-anchor="middle" class="sm" fill="#fff">v2</text>
        <rect x="216" y="0" width="70" height="38" class="cell" fill="#fdf2e9"/><text x="251" y="24" text-anchor="middle" class="sm">new</text>
        <rect x="288" y="0" width="70" height="38" class="cell" fill="#eef6f6"/><text x="323" y="24" text-anchor="middle" class="sm">free</text>
      </g>
      <rect x="540" y="78" width="190" height="92" rx="12" class="box"/>
      <text x="635" y="108" text-anchor="middle" class="txt">CopyBufferRegion</text>
      <text x="635" y="132" text-anchor="middle" class="sm">dst offset = pos * row_bytes</text>
      <text x="635" y="153" text-anchor="middle" class="sm">bytes = seq * row_bytes</text>
      <path d="M540 116 C490 98 455 90 440 89" class="edge"/>
      <path d="M540 140 C490 158 455 166 440 164" class="edge"/>
      <text x="410" y="265" text-anchor="middle" class="sm">append 是纯 GPU buffer-to-buffer copy；不需要把 K/V 读回 CPU。</text>
    </svg>`
